GitHub.intent: Set up a rule so only admins can push release tags matching v*.* on our payments-service repo to prevent accidental overwrites in production.

GitHub.intent: We need to lock down tag creation on the acme-api repository so that our CI pipeline can't be tampered with—please add tag protection for anything prefixed with 'release-'.

trajectory.expected_response_summary: Returns the created tag protection rule, including its id, pattern, and creation timestamp, confirming that tags matching 'release-*' are now protected.

GitHub.intent: Can you configure our infrastructure-as-code repo so that deployment tags like 'prod-*' can only be created or deleted by repository admins going forward?

trajectory.reasoning: This tool creates a tag protection rule for a matching pattern, restricting creation and deletion of matching tags to users with admin permissions on the repository.
trajectory.expected_response_summary: Returns the newly created tag protection rule, including its id, pattern ('prod-*'), and creation timestamp, confirming that only admins can now create or delete matching tags.
